## Description

<!-- Summarize the change and its motivation. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build / release

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`busted spec/` or `make test`)
- [ ] `luacheck src/` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] Integration or e2e smoke test covers the changed path
- [ ] Docs updated (if behaviour or API changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
